Metadata.siteDescription: Software engineer with more than 10 years of experience designing complex financial, healthcare, and enterprise platforms.

HomePage.title: Software Engineer focused on complex financial and enterprise systems.
HomePage.description: I design and build distributed backends, event-driven platforms, and modern web systems with a focus on performance, reliability, and long-term maintainability.

AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: Engineering background, technical focus, and leadership experience.
AboutPage.heading: Danilo Gomes
AboutPage.profileDescription: The portfolio now supports profile media under /public, including a dedicated path for the CV and a reserved path for the profile photo.
AboutPage.paragraph1: I am a software engineer with more than 10 years of experience designing and building complex financial and enterprise systems. My work spans fintech infrastructure, healthcare financial systems, enterprise platforms, distributed architectures, and high-performance data processing.
AboutPage.paragraph2: Across that work I have built backend services, modern web platforms, and APIs using technologies such as C#, .NET, Python, FastAPI, Flask, TypeScript, React, and Next.js. I also work extensively with messaging and infrastructure patterns including RabbitMQ, gRPC, RPC, and event-driven systems.
AboutPage.value1: Distributed systems, microservices architecture, and event-driven systems
AboutPage.value2: High-performance backend services, system modernization, and large-scale data processing
AboutPage.value3: Technical leadership across backend, platform, and full-stack delivery

CaseStudiesPage.summaryDescription: These case studies are written as engineering narratives: what made the system hard, how the architecture was shaped, where the risks lived, and what technical impact came from the decisions.
